race.comment: RADICAL DUDE (8) easily accounted for three rivals on debut here, backed into $1.30 and coming right away to score by 3.5 lengths. Didn't beat much at all but looks to have plenty of ability and can go right on with it. SUN DEVIL (9) looked good winning on debut at Kyneton, settling off the pace and rounding them up comfortably to score by 1.75 lengths. He had support there and looks very capable of measuring up. BOLD RESPONSE (3) proved too slick here last time out when leading throughout. He'll run his usual race which gives them plenty to catch. FREAK OF NATURE (7) is finding it hard to break through but just missed last time and can figure. THE GRUMPY BEAR (4) resumes with solid form lines last time in, respecting.
